headline: TURN FINDINGS INTO CONFIDENCE
subheading: A QP's playbook for evidence-led MHRA responses that hold up under inspection.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking a rigorous regulatory inspection response: a pristine glass meeting surface where translucent layered documents and a crisp inspection report float in precise alignment, intersected by a clean geometric audit checklist motif and fine connecting lines mapping findings to root causes; a delicate magnifying lens of light passing over a structured CAPA flow of nested cards, subtle data-trend ribbons and a calibrated severity gauge arc rising from amber-neutral to a confident green tick indicator; deep navy background with luminous teal and cyan glows, a single fresh-green accent highlight, soft natural window light, shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh, immaculate, authoritative and premium, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
